item.title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:author: glitterware
item.itunes:summary:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.description:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]

item.title: Blender Appimages [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Blender Appimages [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: frutinha
item.itunes:summary:
Blender Appimages
(3D Graphics)
Here, i upload some appimages build by me, using original binaries from blender.org. I don't change any binaries it self, just put inside a appimage container.
I will be posting more by the time, for now, just 4.3.2 and 4.4.3 are avaliable, i will be adding the new ones when blender foundation release then, and also older versions of it!
[read more]
item.description:
Blender Appimages
(3D Graphics)
Here, i upload some appimages build by me, using original binaries from blender.org. I don't change any binaries it self, just put inside a appimage container.
I will be posting more by the time, for now, just 4.3.2 and 4.4.3 are avaliable, i will be adding the new ones when blender foundation release then, and also older versions of it!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Blender Appimages
(3D Graphics)
Here, i upload some appimages build by me, using original binaries from blender.org. I don't change any binaries it self, just put inside a appimage container.
I will be posting more by the time, for now, just 4.3.2 and 4.4.3 are avaliable, i will be adding the new ones when blender foundation release then, and also older versions of it!
[read more]

item.title: mkappimage [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: mkappimage [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: dogbold-system
item.itunes:summary:
mkappimage
(Utilities)
Basic tooling to help me make AppImages.
This tool creates an AppDir with the minimum required structure for manual packaging, based on the parameters given to it.
It supports CLI arguments, documented by -h, and a GUI, accessed with -g.
[read more]
item.description:
mkappimage
(Utilities)
Basic tooling to help me make AppImages.
This tool creates an AppDir with the minimum required structure for manual packaging, based on the parameters given to it.
It supports CLI arguments, documented by -h, and a GUI, accessed with -g.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
mkappimage
(Utilities)
Basic tooling to help me make AppImages.
This tool creates an AppDir with the minimum required structure for manual packaging, based on the parameters given to it.
It supports CLI arguments, documented by -h, and a GUI, accessed with -g.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: MD Cam [Webcam & Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: MD Cam [Webcam & Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: md2222
item.itunes:summary:
MD Cam
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcam tool with motion detection. Based on v4l2. Data formats: JPEG, MJPEG. No sound.
F11 - toggle full screen mode. F10 - maximize window. F9 - fit image to window.
Note: Frame rate very affects cpu usage and size of a video file.

0.0.3 - floating popup top window.
0.0.3.2 - Add one lost icon for dark theme. Add bin file as single file. Manjaro 20 has the required libraries, for example. Themes will be applied.
0.1.2 - Fixed logic of the popup window.
0.2.4 - Fixed camera switching. Optimization.
0.2.8 - True full screen mode. Toolbar is hidden. Move mouse to the edge to show toolbar.
0.3.2 - Fixed JPEG Quality option error. Install/Uninstall scripts.
0.5.1 - "Open data directory" tool button. Auto-update the list of devices when plug/unplug usb-device. (libusb used)
0.6.3 - There were crashes of the program when the camera was turned off sometimes. Fixed it. Detection of very slow motion. For example, changing lighting during a day.
0.7.3 - Detect slow motion as option. Save image button with timer.
0.13.1 - Qt 5.15.0. IP-cameras, web-server (MJPEG-stream only). You can watch through your camera from anywhere in the world. Only you. No cloud. HTTPS and digest authorization used.
You can watch public IP-cameras. Android applications like IP Webcam. Motion detection can be used. Many other improvements. F1 - help.

You can extract the contents of an AppImage.
$ ./mdcam-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
For portable mode create directory near
$ mkdir mdcam-x86_64.AppImage.home
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.
[read more]
item.description:
MD Cam
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcam tool with motion detection. Based on v4l2. Data formats: JPEG, MJPEG. No sound.
F11 - toggle full screen mode. F10 - maximize window. F9 - fit image to window.
Note: Frame rate very affects cpu usage and size of a video file.

0.0.3 - floating popup top window.
0.0.3.2 - Add one lost icon for dark theme. Add bin file as single file. Manjaro 20 has the required libraries, for example. Themes will be applied.
0.1.2 - Fixed logic of the popup window.
0.2.4 - Fixed camera switching. Optimization.
0.2.8 - True full screen mode. Toolbar is hidden. Move mouse to the edge to show toolbar.
0.3.2 - Fixed JPEG Quality option error. Install/Uninstall scripts.
0.5.1 - "Open data directory" tool button. Auto-update the list of devices when plug/unplug usb-device. (libusb used)
0.6.3 - There were crashes of the program when the camera was turned off sometimes. Fixed it. Detection of very slow motion. For example, changing lighting during a day.
0.7.3 - Detect slow motion as option. Save image button with timer.
0.13.1 - Qt 5.15.0. IP-cameras, web-server (MJPEG-stream only). You can watch through your camera from anywhere in the world. Only you. No cloud. HTTPS and digest authorization used.
You can watch public IP-cameras. Android applications like IP Webcam. Motion detection can be used. Many other improvements. F1 - help.

You can extract the contents of an AppImage.
$ ./mdcam-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
For portable mode create directory near
$ mkdir mdcam-x86_64.AppImage.home
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MD Cam
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcam tool with motion detection. Based on v4l2. Data formats: JPEG, MJPEG. No sound.
F11 - toggle full screen mode. F10 - maximize window. F9 - fit image to window.
Note: Frame rate very affects cpu usage and size of a video file.

0.0.3 - floating popup top window.
0.0.3.2 - Add one lost icon for dark theme. Add bin file as single file. Manjaro 20 has the required libraries, for example. Themes will be applied.
0.1.2 - Fixed logic of the popup window.
0.2.4 - Fixed camera switching. Optimization.
0.2.8 - True full screen mode. Toolbar is hidden. Move mouse to the edge to show toolbar.
0.3.2 - Fixed JPEG Quality option error. Install/Uninstall scripts.
0.5.1 - "Open data directory" tool button. Auto-update the list of devices when plug/unplug usb-device. (libusb used)
0.6.3 - There were crashes of the program when the camera was turned off sometimes. Fixed it. Detection of very slow motion. For example, changing lighting during a day.
0.7.3 - Detect slow motion as option. Save image button with timer.
0.13.1 - Qt 5.15.0. IP-cameras, web-server (MJPEG-stream only). You can watch through your camera from anywhere in the world. Only you. No cloud. HTTPS and digest authorization used.
You can watch public IP-cameras. Android applications like IP Webcam. Motion detection can be used. Many other improvements. F1 - help.

You can extract the contents of an AppImage.
$ ./mdcam-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
For portable mode create directory near
$ mkdir mdcam-x86_64.AppImage.home
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.
[read more]

item.title: maRSS Feed Reader [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: maRSS Feed Reader [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: dalman
item.itunes:summary:
maRSS Feed Reader
(Internet Apps)
maRSS Feed Reader sits quietly in your system tray, fetching the latest stories from your feeds the moment they’re published — no ads, no tracking, just content. Designed for GNOME, KDE, Xfce, Mate, and Cinnamon, it blends seamlessly into your workflow.
Customize icons, enable desktop alerts, organize feeds with drag-and-drop, or import/export OPML lists. Built for simplicity and speed.

📘 DOWNLOAD INSTALLER
Get started effortlessly: a one-click auto-installer for Debian/Ubuntu/Mint (handles all dependencies), step-by-step guides for Fedora, Manjaro, openSUSE, and a short demo video to see it in action.
Here’s the link:
[url=https://ko-fi.com/s/47bfe0e228]Download Installer[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
maRSS Feed Reader
(Internet Apps)
maRSS Feed Reader sits quietly in your system tray, fetching the latest stories from your feeds the moment they’re published — no ads, no tracking, just content. Designed for GNOME, KDE, Xfce, Mate, and Cinnamon, it blends seamlessly into your workflow.
Customize icons, enable desktop alerts, organize feeds with drag-and-drop, or import/export OPML lists. Built for simplicity and speed.

📘 DOWNLOAD INSTALLER
Get started effortlessly: a one-click auto-installer for Debian/Ubuntu/Mint (handles all dependencies), step-by-step guides for Fedora, Manjaro, openSUSE, and a short demo video to see it in action.
Here’s the link:
[url=https://ko-fi.com/s/47bfe0e228]Download Installer[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
maRSS Feed Reader
(Internet Apps)
maRSS Feed Reader sits quietly in your system tray, fetching the latest stories from your feeds the moment they’re published — no ads, no tracking, just content. Designed for GNOME, KDE, Xfce, Mate, and Cinnamon, it blends seamlessly into your workflow.
Customize icons, enable desktop alerts, organize feeds with drag-and-drop, or import/export OPML lists. Built for simplicity and speed.

📘 DOWNLOAD INSTALLER
Get started effortlessly: a one-click auto-installer for Debian/Ubuntu/Mint (handles all dependencies), step-by-step guides for Fedora, Manjaro, openSUSE, and a short demo video to see it in action.
Here’s the link:
[url=https://ko-fi.com/s/47bfe0e228]Download Installer[/url]
[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Recently got the information that the rpm packages also work on Fedora.

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.

INFO --> clamav 1.0.7
------------------------------
ClamAV 1.0.7 has an issue with freshclam. Freshclam needs the file "ca-bundle.crt" at the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs". If this file is not pressent, freshclam will not work. On OpenSuSE I found a package with the name "ca-certificates-steamtricks". In this package there is a file "ca-certificates.crt". After installation, I copied the file from "/etc/ssl/certs" to the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs" and renamed it to "ca-bundle.crt". With this, freshclam works on my machine.

INFO --> GNOME-Commander
-----------------------------------------
You find in the download area a pdf file with a description how to add a context menu for scanning while using GNOME Commander.
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Recently got the information that the rpm packages also work on Fedora.

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.

INFO --> clamav 1.0.7
------------------------------
ClamAV 1.0.7 has an issue with freshclam. Freshclam needs the file "ca-bundle.crt" at the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs". If this file is not pressent, freshclam will not work. On OpenSuSE I found a package with the name "ca-certificates-steamtricks". In this package there is a file "ca-certificates.crt". After installation, I copied the file from "/etc/ssl/certs" to the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs" and renamed it to "ca-bundle.crt". With this, freshclam works on my machine.

INFO --> GNOME-Commander
-----------------------------------------
You find in the download area a pdf file with a description how to add a context menu for scanning while using GNOME Commander.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Recently got the information that the rpm packages also work on Fedora.

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect

Added a Spec-File if anybody likes to create a RPM-Package for another Distro that uses RPM-Packages
Added Source Code for QT6 without using core5compat.

INFO --> clamav 1.0.7
------------------------------
ClamAV 1.0.7 has an issue with freshclam. Freshclam needs the file "ca-bundle.crt" at the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs". If this file is not pressent, freshclam will not work. On OpenSuSE I found a package with the name "ca-certificates-steamtricks". In this package there is a file "ca-certificates.crt". After installation, I copied the file from "/etc/ssl/certs" to the folder "/etc/pki/tls/certs" and renamed it to "ca-bundle.crt". With this, freshclam works on my machine.

INFO --> GNOME-Commander
-----------------------------------------
You find in the download area a pdf file with a description how to add a context menu for scanning while using GNOME Commander.
[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
